name: Microwave Basic Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the beef, onion, bread crumbs, beaten egg, ketchup, milk, and seasonings in a bowl until well mixed.
2. Press the mixture into a 9-inch pie plate or similar microwave-safe dish.
3. Spread about 2 tablespoons of ketchup or chili sauce evenly over the top of the meat loaf.
4. If using a temperature probe, insert it so the tip is centered in the food and set to cook at high power for 26-28 minutes until the internal temperature reaches 170 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. If not using a probe, cover tightly with plastic wrap and microwave on medium-high power for 26-28 minutes until done. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
Note: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, avoid aggressive culinary slang such as "smash", "destroy", "burn", or "splutter" when describing cooking methods. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat".
